home.title: Developer

home.description: Frontend Developer focused on transforming complex concepts into fluid, responsive interfaces centered on user experience.

about.title: About
about.profileSubtitle: Software Development Student | Fullstack | FrontEnd | Graphic Designer |
about.paragraph1: My professional trajectory is defined by the convergence between visual communication and computational logic. With over a decade of working in Graphic Design, I developed a keen eye for interfaces and usability, skills I apply directly in building intuitive and visually coherent software. My experience as an Engineering Assistant, while not culminating in graduation in the field, was fundamental to structuring my analytical thinking, teaching me to deal with complex data, technical reports, and problem-solving under pressure.
about.paragraph2: Currently, I am fully dedicated to transitioning into Software Development, studying Technology in Multiplatform Development at Fatec and working as a freelance developer. I have practical experience delivering real Fullstack solutions, such as the complete development of systems for the real estate sector, where I used React, Material UI, and Styled Components on the front-end, integrated with a Node.js (Express) back-end and MySQL databases with Sequelize.
about.paragraph3: My goal is to work as a Software Developer, bringing to the team not only technical knowledge in JavaScript, Python, and modern frameworks, but also the maturity of someone who understands the product end-to-end, from the prototype in Figma to code implementation and deployment. I seek challenges that value adaptability, technical rigor, and a user-centered vision.
